hero.description: We compare all electricity and natural gas providers in Greece to find the best price for you. No hidden fees.

features.heading: Why choose us?
features.description: We save you time and money with our specialized knowledge of the energy market
features.compareDesc: We work with all energy providers in Greece to find the best price.
features.noFeesDesc: Our service is 100% free. We are paid by providers, not by you.
features.personalizedDesc: We consider your needs to recommend the ideal package.

howItWorks.heading: How it works
howItWorks.description: 3 simple steps to reduce your bill
howItWorks.step1Desc: Tell us your phone number and what service interests you
howItWorks.step2Desc: One of our consultants will contact you
howItWorks.step3Desc: We handle the entire provider switching process

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes, our service is 100% free for consumers. We are paid by energy providers as a commission for each new customer we bring them.
faq.q2: How long does switching providers take?
faq.a2: The provider switching process is usually completed in 2-4 weeks. We handle all the paperwork for you.
faq.q3: Will I lose power during the switch?
faq.a3: No, absolutely not. Provider switching happens seamlessly and doesn't affect your electricity or gas supply at all.
faq.a4: We work with all major providers in the Greek market: DEI, Protergia, Elpedison, Zenith, NRG, Volterra, Watt+Volt and many more.

testimonials.heading: What our customers say
testimonials.t1Quote: "I saved €35 per month on electricity without doing anything. They called me, explained the options, and handled everything."
testimonials.t2Quote: "Very professional service. They helped me understand the charges and we found a provider that fits my needs."
testimonials.t3Quote: "I switched both electricity and gas. The difference in the bill is obvious from the first month!"

cta.heading: Ready to save?
